faqs.question: What are drain flies and why are they in my Farmingdale property?
faqs.answer: Drain flies are small, fuzzy-winged insects that breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and other moist areas. In Farmingdale homes and businesses, they commonly appear due to accumulated debris in kitchen and bathroom drains, basement floor drains, or commercial sink systems where moisture and organic matter provide ideal breeding conditions.

faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Farmingdale?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in Farmingdale range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of affected drains, and property size. This includes inspection, treatment of breeding sites, drain cleaning applications, and follow-up recommendations to prevent recurrence.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate drain flies from my Farmingdale property?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments show immediate reduction in adult fly activity, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks as we target both adult flies and larvae in breeding sites. Our Farmingdale technicians can usually provide same-day or next-day service, and we offer follow-up visits if needed to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my family and pets in Farmingdale?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and bio-enzymatic drain cleaners that break down organic matter without harsh chemicals. We provide clear instructions for any brief waiting periods and offer eco-friendly options for sensitive environments like homes with young children or pets.
